summary: Iteration 67: Verified 2 changes - (1) Email config now uses hello@thehoneygroove.com everywhere, no references to old email; (2) Explore page renamed to Nectar - frontend routes /nectar and /nectar/:section work, page title shows 'Nectar', nav labels show 'Nectar'. Fixed critical bug: frontend was calling non-existent /api/nectar/* endpoints, reverted to correct /api/explore/* endpoints.
passed_tests: Backend: ADMIN_NOTIFY_EMAIL in admin.py is hello@thehoneygroove.com - PASSED
Backend: SENDER_EMAIL in email_service.py contains 'The Honey Groove' and 'hello@thehoneygroove.com' - PASSED
Backend: No references to contact@kathrynklodnicki.com in backend production code - PASSED
Frontend: No /explore user route references in frontend (API calls correctly use /api/explore) - PASSED
Frontend: Route /nectar loads the Nectar page when logged in - PASSED
Frontend: Page title shows 'Nectar' on the Nectar page - PASSED
Frontend: Desktop nav shows 'Nectar' instead of 'Explore' - PASSED
Frontend: Mobile bottom nav links to /nectar - PASSED
Frontend: See-all pages link back to /nectar (not /explore) - PASSED

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.bug: Frontend was calling non-existent /api/nectar/* API endpoints
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.root_cause: Main agent renamed frontend routes from /explore to /nectar but also incorrectly changed API calls from /api/explore/* to /api/nectar/* - the backend API endpoints were never renamed
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix_applied: Reverted API calls in ExplorePage.js and ExploreSeeAllPage.js to use /api/explore/* endpoints

email_config_update.description: All email config now uses hello@thehoneygroove.com
verified: No references to contact@kathrynklodnicki.com in backend source

explore_to_nectar_rename.description: Explore page renamed to Nectar throughout frontend
explore_to_nectar_rename.note: Backend API routes remain /api/explore/* (only user-facing frontend routes changed to /nectar)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED BUG: Frontend ExplorePage.js and ExploreSeeAllPage.js were calling /api/nectar/* endpoints that don't exist - changed back to /api/explore/*
Email config correctly updated to hello@thehoneygroove.com in admin.py and email_service.py
Frontend routes correctly use /nectar for user navigation while API calls use /api/explore
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user from iteration 66
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified email config change (hello@thehoneygroove.com) and Explore→Nectar rename. Fixed critical bug where frontend was calling /api/nectar/* (404s) instead of /api/explore/*. Backend API routes remain /api/explore/* - only frontend user-facing routes changed to /nectar. All tests pass. Email service is MOCKED in dev (Resend).
